jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.content:
We are looking for a Software Engineer to join our platform team. You will build scalable APIs and contribute to our core infrastructure.

Requirements

  • 3+ years of experience
  • TypeScript proficiency
  • Experience with distributed systems

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.content: Join our frontend team to build beautiful user interfaces with React and TypeScript.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.content: Design and build high-throughput data processing pipelines using Go and PostgreSQL.
